markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 550. Collisions & Collision Reports
##### § 550.066 — Admissibility of Certain Collision Report Information

An individual’s response to the information requested on a collision report form as provided by Section 550.064 (Collision Report Forms) (b)(4) is not admissible evidence in a civil trial.

*Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 709 (H.B.2190), Sec. 58, eff. September 1, 2023.*
